result.stderr:
Faultify.Cli 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Timon, Janfokke

  -p, --testProjectName    Required. The path pointing to the test project
                           project file.

  -r, --reportPath         The path were the report will be saved.

  -t, --reportType         (Default: json) Type of report to be generated,
                           options: 'pdf', 'html', 'json'

  -l, --mutationLevel      (Default: Detailed) The mutation level indicating the
                           test depth.

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.
